sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Ladder climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player can climb up and down ladders to traverse between levels and areas. Game includes both up-ladder and down-ladder transitions between floor levels.

special_mechanics.name: Jumping to higher ledges
special_mechanics.description: Some areas contain higher ledges that Golgo-13 can jump to, as noted in the Hitler's Brain Room unused area which is documented as having a higher ledge that the player can jump to.

tier_notes: Tier 2: No precise movement physics values documented in available sources. Game is primarily documented for content, story, unused areas, and regional differences rather than mechanical physics parameters. The game features a mixed paradigm (platformer-shooter-3D maze) which may complicate standard movement parameter documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Golgo 13: Top Secret Episode article
Wikipedia - Golgo 13: Top Secret Episode article
